form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 14 at Fontainebleau November 22 over 3000m, soft track; 13 len behind Kaleo Caesar with 58kg at $7. On debut eighth of 12 at Clairefontaine August 18 over 2200m, 16 len behind Melanesia with 56kg at $51. Can play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11.5). Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 14 at Fontainebleau November 22 over 3000m, soft track; 13 len behind Kaleo Caesar with 58kg at $7. On debut eighth of 12 at Clairefontaine August 18 over 2200m, 16 len behind Melanesia with 56kg at $51. Can play a big role.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run won by 0.5 len at Fontainebleau March 31 over 3000m in soft going defeating Chess with 58kg at $20. The race before that won by 2.5 len at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather February 21 over 2400m defeating Kawaalot carrying 60kg at $5.20. Rates highly and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run won by 0.5 len at Fontainebleau March 31 over 3000m in soft going defeating Chess with 58kg at $20. The race before that won by 2.5 len at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather February 21 over 2400m defeating Kawaalot carrying 60kg at $5.20. Rates highly and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 41 day let-up. Most recently raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len at Fontainebleau March 6 over 3000m on a soft track defeating Black Saxon carrying 57.5kg at $5.20. Before that won by 1.0 len at Cagnes-sur-Mer February 18 over 3200m on a rain affected track defeating Amor A Mani carrying 55kg at $5.70. Rates highly and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12.5). Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 41 day let-up. Before that won by 1.0 len at Cagnes-sur-Mer February 18 over 3200m on a rain affected track defeating Amor A Mani carrying 55kg at $5.70. Rates highly and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after about 18 months held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 29 over 2400m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Spanish Prince carrying 55kg at $33. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Dieppe on June 14 2024 over 2400m, 5 len behind Santao with 58kg at $30. Sure to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when won by 2.5 len at Vitteaux July 6 over 2600m defeating Storyville carrying 59.5kg. Happy to overlook in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(29). Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when won by 2.5 len at Vitteaux July 6 over 2600m defeating Storyville carrying 59.5kg. Happy to overlook in this company.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 29 over 2400m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Spanish Prince with 55.5kg at $8.10. The run before that 5th of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on February 13 over 2700m, 3.5 len behind Barbate carrying 53.5kg at $7. Capable of much better and can improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB

The run before that 5th of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on February 13 over 2700m, 3.5 len behind Barbate carrying 53.5kg at $7. Capable of much better and can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up second last of 9 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 6 len behind Wally carrying 53kg at $15. Second-up won by a head at Durtal March 22 over 2900m defeating Lily Des Champs with 66.5kg. In a suitable race and should measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(23). Third-up today. First-up second last of 9 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 6 len behind Wally carrying 53kg at $15. Second-up won by a head at Durtal March 22 over 2900m defeating Lily Des Champs with 66.5kg. In a suitable race and should measure up.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 14 at Nancy on April 4 over 3000m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Mission Secrete with 59kg at $8.40. The start before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 13 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 3000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Trevor Senora with 68.5kg at $59. Not one of the major players.
